P18825.name: ADA2C_HUMAN
P18825.description: RecName: Full=Alpha-2C adrenergic receptor {ECO:0000303|PubMed:2842764}; AltName: Full=Alpha-2 adrenergic receptor subtype C4 {ECO:0000303|PubMed:9371698}; AltName: Full=Alpha-2C adrenoreceptor; Short=Alpha-2C adrenoceptor; Short=Alpha-2CAR;

gpcr_info.name: ADRA2C
gpcr_info.function: ADRA2C is an alpha-2 adrenergic receptor that couples to Gi/o proteins to inhibit adenylate cyclase

Q9Y5N1.name: HRH3_HUMAN
Q9Y5N1.description: RecName: Full=Histamine H3 receptor; Short=H3R; Short=HH3R; AltName: Full=G-protein coupled receptor 97;

gpcr_info.name: HRH3
gpcr_info.function: HRH3 couples to Gi/o proteins and functions as a presynaptic histamine receptor

P21554.name: CNR1_HUMAN
P21554.description: RecName: Full=Cannabinoid receptor 1; Short=CB-R; Short=CB1; AltName: Full=CANN6;

gpcr_info.name: CNR1
gpcr_info.function: CNR1 is a cannabinoid receptor that couples to Gi/o proteins to inhibit adenylate cyclase
